channel.title: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
channel.description:
Hi,
I just released v.1.0.0 for the Frontity cf7 package. This version has mostly been focused on bugs, and keeping up with the latest version of the plugin. I fixed some new issues reported through GitHub, and now every issues is closed.
https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7

item.title: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Great work @kasper. Thanks for the release.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation

item.title: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
item.dc:creator: mikes
item.description:
That’s great to hear thank you @kasper for helping solve the issues with this and sharing it with the community. I am pretty sure this will be very helpful for those utilising Contact Form 7 and wishing to look for a way to connect this properly with Frontity.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation

item.title: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
I’m trying to reach out to @imranhsayed atm for him to deprecate his package, and point it to mine.

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation

item.title: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi,

I just released v.1.0.0 for the Frontity cf7 package. This version has mostly been focused on bugs, and keeping up with the latest version of the plugin. I fixed some new issues reported through GitHub, and now every issues is closed.

npm

@aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7

Contact Form 7 extension for Frontity theme.. Latest version: 1.0.1, last published: 26 minutes ago. Start using @aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7 in your project by running `npm i @aamodtgroup/frontity-contact-form-7`. There are no other projects...

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity Contact Form 7 release: Fix input validation
